changes.value:
## What

The frontend currently has its own `UndoStack` class and `UndoStackProvider` that maintain independent in-memory state. Since all undo state now lives in Rust, replace this with a thin layer that queries the backend.

**Changes:**

1. **Replace `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.tsx`:**
   - Remove `UndoStack` ref тАФ no client-side stack
   - `undo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.undo' })`
   - `redo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.redo' })`
   - `canUndo`/`canRedo` тЖТ query from `invoke('get_undo_state')`, refresh after every `entity-changed` event
   - Keep the React context shape so consumers don't change

2. **Remove `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.ts`** тАФ no longer needed

3. **Remove `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.test.ts`** тАФ no longer needed

4. **Update `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx`** тАФ remove `UndoStackProvider` import if the provider shape changes

5. **Update `app-shell.tsx`** тАФ the `app.undo` and `app.redo` commands should dispatch to backend (they already do since they have no local `execute`), verify this still works

**Files to modify:**
- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.tsx` тАФ rewrite as backend query
- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.ts` тАФ delete
- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.test.ts` тАФ delete
- `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx` тАФ update imports if needed

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No client-side undo stack тАФ all state comes from backend
- [ ] `useUndoStack()` hook still works with same interface
- [ ] `canUndo`/`canRedo` update reactively after entity changes
- [ ] Cmd+Z / Cmd+Shift+Z trigger backend undo/redo

## Tests
- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.test.tsx` тАФ test that undo/redo invoke dispatch_command
- [ ] Existing app-shell tests still pass
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
Frontend: replace UndoStack with thin backend query layer

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,37 +1,31 @@
 ## What

-The frontend currently has its own `UndoStack` class and `UndoStackProvider` that maintain independent in-memory state. Since all undo state now lives in Rust, replace this with a thin layer that queries the backend.
-
-**Changes:**
+Remove ALL client-side undo state. The frontend becomes a pure passthrough тАФ it sends `app.undo`/`app.redo` commands to the backend and queries `get_undo_state` for can_undo/can_redo. Zero undo logic in TypeScript.

-1. **Replace `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.tsx`:**
-   - Remove `UndoStack` ref тАФ no client-side stack
-   - `undo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.undo' })`
-   - `redo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.redo' })`
-   - `canUndo`/`canRedo` тЖТ query from `invoke('get_undo_state')`, refresh after every `entity-changed` event
-   - Keep the React context shape so consumers don't change
+**Delete entirely:**
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.ts` тАФ the UndoStack class
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.test.ts` тАФ its tests

-2. **Remove `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.ts`** тАФ no longer needed
-
-3. **Remove `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.test.ts`** тАФ no longer needed
+**Rewrite `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.tsx`:**
+- Remove `UndoStack` import and ref
+- Remove `push()` from the context interface тАФ nothing pushes from the frontend
+- `undo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.undo' })`
+- `redo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.redo' })`
+- `canUndo`/`canRedo` тЖТ fetched from `invoke('get_undo_state')`, refreshed on every `entity-changed` Tauri event
+- Export `useUndoState()` hook (renamed from `useUndoStack`) with `{ undo, redo, canUndo, canRedo }`

-4. **Update `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx`** тАФ remove `UndoStackProvider` import if the provider shape changes
+**Update consumers:**
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx` тАФ update provider (may simplify, no more UndoStackProvider wrapping)
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/app-shell.test.tsx` тАФ remove UndoStackProvider from test wrappers
+- Any other file importing from `undo-stack` or `undo-context`

-5. **Update `app-shell.tsx`** тАФ the `app.undo` and `app.redo` commands should dispatch to backend (they already do since they have no local `execute`), verify this still works
-
-**Files to modify:**
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.tsx` тАФ rewrite as backend query
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.ts` тАФ delete
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.test.ts` тАФ delete
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx` тАФ update imports if needed
-
 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] No client-side undo stack тАФ all state comes from backend
-- [ ] `useUndoStack()` hook still works with same interface
-- [ ] `canUndo`/`canRedo` update reactively after entity changes
-- [ ] Cmd+Z / Cmd+Shift+Z trigger backend undo/redo
+- [ ] Zero undo logic in TypeScript тАФ no UndoStack class, no pointer, no entries array
+- [ ] `undo-stack.ts` and `undo-stack.test.ts` deleted
+- [ ] Frontend undo/redo calls dispatch to Rust backend
+- [ ] `canUndo`/`canRedo` reflect backend state
+- [ ] All undo/redo is fully testable from Rust without UI

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.test.tsx` тАФ test that undo/redo invoke dispatch_command
-- [ ] Existing app-shell tests still pass
-- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `pnpm test` passes with no undo-stack references
+- [ ] Grep for `UndoStack` in `ui/src/` returns zero hits (only `useUndoState` remains)
\ No newline at end of file

 ## What

-Remove ALL client-side undo state. The frontend becomes a pure passthrough тАФ it sends `app.undo`/`app.redo` commands to the backend and queries `get_undo_state` for can_undo/can_redo. Zero undo logic in TypeScript.
+The frontend currently has its own `UndoStack` class and `UndoStackProvider` that maintain independent in-memory state. Since all undo state now lives in Rust, replace this with a thin layer that queries the backend.

-**Delete entirely:**
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.ts` тАФ the UndoStack class
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.test.ts` тАФ its tests
+**Changes:**

-**Rewrite `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.tsx`:**
-- Remove `UndoStack` import and ref
-- Remove `push()` from the context interface тАФ nothing pushes from the frontend
-- `undo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.undo' })`
-- `redo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.redo' })`
-- `canUndo`/`canRedo` тЖТ fetched from `invoke('get_undo_state')`, refreshed on every `entity-changed` Tauri event
-- Export `useUndoState()` hook (renamed from `useUndoStack`) with `{ undo, redo, canUndo, canRedo }`
+1. **Replace `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.tsx`:**
+   - Remove `UndoStack` ref тАФ no client-side stack
+   - `undo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.undo' })`
+   - `redo()` тЖТ `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'app.redo' })`
+   - `canUndo`/`canRedo` тЖТ query from `invoke('get_undo_state')`, refresh after every `entity-changed` event
+   - Keep the React context shape so consumers don't change
+
+2. **Remove `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.ts`** тАФ no longer needed
+
+3. **Remove `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.test.ts`** тАФ no longer needed
+
+4. **Update `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx`** тАФ remove `UndoStackProvider` import if the provider shape changes
+
+5. **Update `app-shell.tsx`** тАФ the `app.undo` and `app.redo` commands should dispatch to backend (they already do since they have no local `execute`), verify this still works

-**Update consumers:**
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx` тАФ update provider (may simplify, no more UndoStackProvider wrapping)
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/app-shell.test.tsx` тАФ remove UndoStackProvider from test wrappers
-- Any other file importing from `undo-stack` or `undo-context`
+**Files to modify:**
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-context.tsx` тАФ rewrite as backend query
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.ts` тАФ delete
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/undo-stack.test.ts` тАФ delete
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx` тАФ update imports if needed

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Zero undo logic in TypeScript тАФ no UndoStack class, no pointer, no entries array
-- [ ] `undo-stack.ts` and `undo-stack.test.ts` deleted
-- [ ] Frontend undo/redo calls dispatch to Rust backend
-- [ ] `canUndo`/`canRedo` reflect backend state
-- [ ] All undo/redo is fully testable from Rust without UI
+- [ ] No client-side undo stack тАФ all state comes from backend
+- [ ] `useUndoStack()` hook still works with same interface
+- [ ] `canUndo`/`canRedo` update reactively after entity changes
+- [ ] Cmd+Z / Cmd+Shift+Z trigger backend undo/redo

 ## Tests

-- [ ] Grep for `UndoStack` in `ui/src/` returns zero hits (only `useUndoState` remains)
